title: clematis apiifolia subsp. apiculata
intro: Clematis apiifolia subsp. apiculata is a sub-species of Clematis apiifolia, a flowering plant native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and may also have antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat its medicinal properties.
